name: Walnut Honey Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine one cup of butter, honey, and brown sugar in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently.
2. Add 3/4 cup of the chopped nuts. Continue cooking, stirring often, until it reaches 300°F on a candy thermometer (hard-crack stage).
3. Pour the candy into a well-buttered 8-inch cake pan. Cool.
4. Melt butterscotch pieces with remaining butter over hot water.
5. While the candy is still warm, spread half of the butterscotch mixture and sprinkle with the remaining nuts.
6. When the candy is cold, turn out of the cake pan and spread the remaining butterscotch mixture on top. Sprinkle with the remaining nuts.
7. Break into small irregular pieces before eating.
